nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Hermann Burmeister
nodes.summary: Hermann Burmeister是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联5种鸟类，包括白枕霸鹟、Cinnamon-bellied ground tyrant、Black-fronted ground tyrant等5种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛

nodes.name: 鷚叢跑雀
nodes.summary: 鷚叢跑雀（Lark-like brushrunner，学名 Coryphistera alaudina），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The lark-like brushrunner (Coryphistera alaudina) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in southern Bolivia, northern and eastern Argentina, northwestern Uruguay, and slightly into the southernmost Brazilian state of Rio Grande do Sul

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: campicola is found in southeastern Bolivia and western Paraguay. The species inhabits open to semi-open landscapes including arid lowland scrublands, arid Gran Chaco woodlands, savanna, pastures with trees, and to a lesser extent agricultural fields
